## Summary

_What does this PR do? (2–3 sentences)_

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactor (no feature change)
- [ ] `test` — Test additions/changes
- [ ] `chore` — Build, CI, dependency update
- [ ] `security` — Security improvement

---

## IBM Bob Session

**Was IBM Bob used for this PR?**  
- [ ] Yes (required for any feature or fix)
- [ ] No (documentation/chore only)

**Bob Mode(s) used**: (Ask / Plan / Code)

**Session log**: `docs/bob-log/YYYY-MM-DD_<topic>.png`

**Brief summary of what Bob helped with**:
_e.g., "Used Plan mode to design the script parser architecture, Code mode to generate the Pydantic models"_

---

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No plaintext scripts are transmitted over the network
- [ ] No credentials or secrets committed to source code
- [ ] AES-256 encryption applied where required
- [ ] Watermarking applied to any generated media
- [ ] New environment variables added to `.env.example`

---

## Arabic / RTL Checklist (for frontend changes)

- [ ] Component tested with Arabic text input
- [ ] RTL layout verified
- [ ] N/A — backend-only change

---

## Testing

- [ ] Tests written for new functionality
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest` / `npm run test`)
- [ ] Manually tested the feature end-to-end

---

## Related Issues

Closes #

_Anything specific you want the reviewer to focus on?_
